name: IRCTC Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: IRCTC train ticket bookings (via IRCTC website/app)
rewards.displayRate: Up to 40 reward points per Rs 100

exclusions: fuel spends eligible for surcharge waiver do not earn reward points
IRCTC rewards require linking the card loyalty number with IRCTC login ID
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: 1,000 bonus reward points on a single transaction of Rs 1,000 or more within 45 days of card issuance
additionalBenefits: 4 complimentary partner railway lounge visits per year, limited to 1 per quarter
1% IRCTC transaction charge waiver on eligible train ticket bookings through the IRCTC website and mobile app
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions between Rs 500 and Rs 3,000, capped at Rs 100 per statement
Up to 3 lifetime free add-on cards
additionalDetails: Link the IRCTC BOBCARD loyalty number with the IRCTC login ID to unlock the accelerated reward rate on IRCTC bookings.
Minimum 1,000 points required for statement balance redemption (effective July 1, 2025).

salaried: Annual income of Rs 3.6 lakh or more
selfEmployed: Annual income of Rs 4.8 lakh or more

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Audited against the official IRCTC BOBCARD product page on 2026-06-14.

The official page confirms: up to 40 reward points per Rs 100 on IRCTC train bookings, 4 reward points per Rs 100 on grocery and departmental store spends (capped at 1,000 pts/month), 2 reward points per Rs 100 on other eligible spends.
The lounge benefit is for partner railway lounges only, not airport lounges, so loungeDomestic remains 0 to avoid mislabeling in airport-lounge UI.
